user_query: I'm planning a road trip with my friends and we want to keep the journey lighthearted. Can you suggest some funny jokes and memes to share during the trip? Also, find us a campground with recreational activities and a nearby restaurant for meals.

TaskList.description: Gather a collection of funny jokes and memes suitable for sharing during the road trip.
Search for campgrounds that offer recreational activities in the planned road trip area.
Identify nearby restaurants close to the chosen campground that are suitable for meals.
